null_expectations.note: Expected exceedance fractions if the climate matched the 1991-2020 baseline. Counts above these are the anomaly signal; counts near them are the base rate.

validation.note: Lokmat Times and other outlets document a severe late-May 2024 Rajasthan heatwave with Jodhpur ~44–46°C, consistent with the flagged ~46.1°C.
Searched Jodhpur / Rajasthan unseasonable cold Oct 2025 and date variants; no news, weather report or IMD data found.
Found IMD bulletins on the monsoon's northern limit near Jodhpur around 8–9 Jul 2023 but no confirmation of ~23mm daily rainfall on that date.
